label: Live router no longer has machine-readable STACK_FOLDERS contract
OpenCode intent taxonomy is broader than OpenCode resource map
Verifier cannot catch Markdown resource-map drift
Spec-folder writes are named in verification but not loaded as an OpenCode recipe
CocoIndex has no canonical OpenCode authoring or spec resource target to prefer

direction: Treat old NEXTJS STACK_FOLDERS changelog as live contract
reason: Current sk-code router files use OpenCode prose tables and wildcards; only the historical changelog mentions STACK_FOLDERS/resource_map_for.
